metadata.title: Turning a Tight 1v2 Hold Into a Clean Win with Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how careful positioning and timing help secure a tough 1v2 hold. Sometimes patience and angles make all the difference. What’s your favorite clutch spot?

Got a clutch moment like this? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
